nasb.text: The watchmen who make the rounds in the city found me, They struck me and wounded me; The guardsmen of the walls took away my shawl from me.

esv.text: The watchmen found me as they went about in the city; they beat me, they bruised me, they took away my veil, those watchmen of the walls.

cnv.text: 城中的守衛巡邏的時候，找著我； 他們打了我，傷了我； 看守城牆的人奪去了我身上的外衣。

ccb.text: 城中巡逻的卫兵遇见我， 把我打伤了， 看守城墙的人还抢走了我的披肩。
